segments.text: Thank you for calling Speedy Auto Repair, this is Michael speaking. How can I help you today?
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Hi Michael, it's Paul Wright. I was wondering if I could schedule an oil change for my car.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Hi Paul! It’s great to hear from you again. When are you looking to come in?
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: I was hoping to come in this Saturday. Is that possible?
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Let me check. Yes, we have openings on Saturday from 9 AM to 4 PM.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Perfect! Could you also tell me about the oil change process?
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Absolutely! The oil change takes about 30 minutes and includes up to 5 quarts of oil and a new filter.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Sounds good. Is the price still between $40 and $60?
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Yes, that's correct. It depends on the type of oil you choose.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: I usually go with synthetic. What would that cost?
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: The synthetic oil change would be around $60. Would you like to book that?
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Yes, let's do that. Saturday at 9 AM, please.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Got it! I’ll put you down for Saturday at 9 AM for a synthetic oil change.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Thanks! By the way, I noticed my brakes have been a bit squeaky lately.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: I can understand that concern. Would you like to schedule a brake inspection as well?
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Yes, that would be great. Can we do that on the same day?
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Sure! The brake inspection takes about 30 minutes and costs $30.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Sounds good. So, that’s two services on Saturday then?
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Exactly! An oil change and a brake inspection.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Perfect. Do I need to bring anything?
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Just your vehicle and any questions you have about the services.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Great! I appreciate the detailed info.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: No problem, Paul! I’ll send you a reminder the day before.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: That’d be helpful, thanks. Can I also get a quote for a battery replacement?
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Sure! Battery replacement costs between $100 and $200, depending on the model.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: I’ll think about it and let you know.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Sounds good! If you decide, we can check that during your visit.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Will do! Thanks for your help today, Michael.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: You're welcome, Paul! Looking forward to seeing you on Saturday.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Me too! Bye for now.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Goodbye!
segments.speaker: local party
